creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On CURRENT, FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #2 r275576: Sun Dec  7 12:56:31 CET 2014 amd64, recompilation or fresh install of net/samba41 fails with the error below.

trying different configurations, beginning with the standard one (by make rmconfig), does have no effect. This failure seems to be present on every CURRENT box compilation has been tried on.
